theme_and_archetype.description: Premium, deep, mysterious, and cinematic. The 'Deep Void' surface strategy uses deep charcoals rather than pure black to prevent harsh contrast. Gold metallic accents provide a high-end automotive showroom feel.

headings.usage: H1, H2, hero text, and primary section titles.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, but highly generous. Use py-20 to py-32 for sections.

grids.marketing: Asymmetric Bento grids. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with varied spans (e.g., col-span-8 and col-span-4).
grids.dashboard: Dense 'Control Room' grid for the admin panel. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, gap-4.

surfaces.glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#090A0C]/70 border-b border-white/10 (for sticky header)

hover_states.cards: transform -translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 ease-out border-[#D4AF37]/50 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(212,175,55,0.1)]

scroll.library: framer-motion for staggered fade-ins and subtle upward translations (y: 20 -> y: 0) on scroll.

header.style: Sticky, glassmorphism (bg-[#090A0C]/80 backdrop-blur-md). Includes Logo, Nav Links, 'Call 877-679-0100', and a prominent Gold 'Book Now' CTA.

hero.layout: Full viewport height (min-h-[90vh]). Background image with heavy dark gradient overlay to ensure text contrast. Center-aligned elegant typography.
hero.content: H1: 'Luxury Black Car Service in Washington DC, Maryland & Virginia'. H2/Sub: 'Premium chauffeured transportation for executives, airport transfers, and special events.'
hero.ctas: Primary: Gold Button 'Book Now'. Secondary: Outline Button 'View Fleet'.

booking_form.style: Embedded glass card or clean solid dark surface (#15161A). Inputs must use Shadcn customized to dark theme with gold focus rings (focus:ring-[#D4AF37]).

fleet_section.layout: Grid of cards. Each card has an image, Vehicle Name (H3), max passengers/luggage icons, and 'Reserve' button. Hovering card highlights the border in gold.

admin_dashboard.style: Password protected. Use Shadcn Table, Tabs, and Card components. Strictly functional, tabular-nums for dates/prices, high density. Sidebar navigation.

components.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-book-button').

hero_background.description: Dynamic black luxury SUV moving swiftly through city streets at night. Use with heavy dark overlay.

fleet_suv.description: Black SUV driving at night. Represents the Cadillac Escalade / Lincoln Navigator.

fleet_interior.description: Luxury car interior with ambient starry roof lighting. Represents the Sprinter executive van interior.

service_areas_bg.description: Washington DC Capitol Hill at night. Perfect for the Routes or Airport Transfers section background.

icons.style: Clean, thin stroke (strokeWidth={1.5}). Used for passengers, luggage, checkmarks, and contact info.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the marketing pages to achieve the bespoke, high-end asymmetric layouts.
Use Shadcn UI primarily for the Admin Dashboard and complex forms (like the booking widget), customizing them to match the dark/gold theme.
Ensure all backgrounds use the provided custom colors (#090A0C) rather than standard Tailwind gray scales.
Apply Framer Motion for scroll-triggered reveals on the marketing site.
Make the mobile experience flawless: sticky 'Book Now' and 'Call' buttons at the bottom of the screen on mobile devices.
Implement Semantic HTML and schema markup for SEO.
